meta.title: India Thematic Overlays
meta.note: Augments india-exam-map.json. Geometries are simplified/schematic for demonstration — replace properties.geojson with real GeoJSON for production.

properties.name: Ganga
properties.note: Gangotri → Prayagraj → Patna → Ganga delta (Bay of Bengal).

properties.name: Yamuna
properties.note: Yamunotri → Delhi → Agra → joins Ganga at Prayagraj (Sangam).

properties.name: Brahmaputra
properties.note: Enters via Arunachal; braids across the Assam valley.

properties.name: Narmada
properties.note: Amarkantak → west across MP/Gujarat to the Arabian Sea.

properties.name: Godavari
properties.note: Peninsular India's longest river; Maharashtra → Bay of Bengal.

properties.name: Delhi–Howrah Line
properties.note: Historic Grand Chord / main line via Kanpur, Prayagraj, Asansol.

properties.name: Delhi–Mumbai Line
properties.note: Western trunk via Mathura, Kota, Vadodara.

properties.name: NH 19 (Delhi–Kolkata)
properties.note: Part of the Golden Quadrilateral, via Kanpur & Varanasi.

properties.name: NH 48 (Delhi–Mumbai)
properties.note: GQ south-west arm via Jaipur, Ahmedabad.

properties.name: Jim Corbett N.P.
properties.note: India's oldest national park (1936); core tiger habitat.

properties.name: Kaziranga N.P.
properties.note: Assam; world stronghold of the one-horned rhinoceros.

properties.name: Gir N.P.
properties.note: Gujarat; only wild population of Asiatic lions.

properties.name: Ganga
properties.note: Enters near Bijnor; flows by Kanpur, Prayagraj, Varanasi.

properties.name: Yamuna
properties.note: Runs along the south-west; meets the Ganga at Prayagraj.

properties.name: Ghaghara (Sarayu)
properties.note: Northern river past Ayodhya; joins the Ganga in Bihar.

properties.name: Gomti
properties.note: Rises in Pilibhit; flows through Lucknow to the Ganga.

properties.name: Upper Ganga Canal
properties.note: Major irrigation canal off the Ganga (Haridwar command).

properties.name: Sharda Canal
properties.note: Irrigates the central UP plains from the Sharda river.

properties.name: Delhi–Howrah Main Line
properties.note: Via Aligarh – Kanpur – Prayagraj.

properties.name: Lucknow–Gorakhpur Line
properties.note: North-eastern UP corridor (NER).

properties.name: Purvanchal Expressway
properties.note: Lucknow → Ghazipur access-controlled expressway.

properties.name: Yamuna Expressway
properties.note: Greater Noida → Agra.

properties.name: NH 19
properties.note: Grand Trunk Road corridor across the state.

properties.name: Dudhwa N.P.
properties.note: Terai grasslands on the Nepal border; tigers & swamp deer.

properties.name: National Chambal Sanctuary
properties.note: Gharial, dolphins & turtles along the Chambal ravines.

properties.name: Hastinapur W.L.S.
properties.note: Ganga floodplain sanctuary; swamp deer habitat.

properties.name: Kishanpur W.L.S.
properties.note: Part of the Dudhwa Tiger Reserve landscape.

properties.name: Nawabganj (Chandra Shekhar Azad)
properties.note: Bird sanctuary wetland near Unnao; winter migrants.

properties.name: Sandi Bird Sanctuary
properties.note: Shallow wetland in Hardoi district.

properties.name: Samaspur Bird Sanctuary
properties.note: Rae Bareli wetland complex; ducks & cranes.

properties.name: Rihand Reservoir (Govind Ballabh Pant Sagar)
properties.note: One of India's largest reservoirs, in Sonbhadra.

properties.name: Ramgarh Tal
properties.note: Large lake in Gorakhpur, now a lakefront destination.

properties.name: Taj Mahal
properties.note: Agra — 17th-c. marble mausoleum; UNESCO site.

properties.name: Bara Imambara
properties.note: Lucknow — 1784 monument with the Bhulbhulaiya maze.

properties.name: Kashi Vishwanath
properties.note: Varanasi — one of the twelve Jyotirlingas.

properties.name: Triveni Sangam
properties.note: Prayagraj — confluence of Ganga, Yamuna & mythical Saraswati.

properties.name: Sarnath
properties.note: Where the Buddha gave his first sermon.

properties.name: Fatehpur Sikri
properties.note: Akbar's red-sandstone capital near Agra; UNESCO site.
